MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Citywide Properties, Inc. is present. Represented by Bill Lofton
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Vanderhorst is present.
Attorney Alex Trimble representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Goldsmith, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 613, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
